name: 10 MG Buspirone Hydrochloride Tablets IP
about: 10 MG Buspirone Hydrochloride Tablets IP is a general medicine used to treat anxiety disorders. The medication helps to balance the chemicals in the brain that may cause anxiety. This tablet is made in India and is available in a physical form of tablets. It is recommended to take the medication as per the doctors suggestion. The dosage of each tablet is 10 mg. The tablets should be stored in a dry and cool place to maintain their effectiveness. Each box of this medication contains 10*10 tablets. This medication is available from an exporter, supplier, and trader.

faq.a: The medication is used to treat anxiety disorders, by balancing the chemicals in the brain that may cause anxiety.

faq.q: What is the dosage of each tablet?
faq.a: Each tablet contains 10 mg of the medication.

faq.q: How should these tablets be stored?
faq.a: The tablets should be stored in a dry and cool place to maintain their effectiveness.

faq.q: How many tablets are in each box?
faq.a: Each box of this medication contains 10*10 tablets.

faq.a: Yes, this medication is available from an exporter, supplier, and trader.
